payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a reddish-brown wooden dining chair with a curved slatted back and a light beige padded seat cushion; front seat edge and leg area are visible and show some surface wear and polished wood grain—appears to be a standard dining chair approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
